metadata.description: Agent Plugins for Alibaba Cloud (Unofficial) equip AI coding agents with the skills to help you architect, deploy, and operate on Alibaba Cloud. This is a community-driven project and is NOT affiliated with Alibaba Cloud.

plugins.description: Generate Alibaba Cloud CLI commands safely using MCP-based API discovery and command generation. No direct CLI execution — commands are generated for review only.
plugins.name: alibabacloud-cli-usage
